title: Hua Hin, Prachuap Khiri Khan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hua Hin, Prachuap Khiri Khan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hua Hin is a city in Prachuap Khiri Khan with a population of 100,000. A royal beach resort town with a relaxed atmosphere, golf courses, and a growing expat community, offering a quieter alternative to Pattaya and Phuket.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
